title: stenotis greenei
intro: Stenotis greenei, also known as Greene's stenotis, is a flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Stenotis greenei include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
